tag: One of India's most trusted real estate developers, part of the 127-year-old Godrej Group. Building sustainable, design-led communities across 16+ cities.
about: Godrej Properties Limited (GPL) is one of India's leading real estate developers, known for its focus on design innovation, sustainability, and urban transformation. As part of the 127-year-old Godrej Group, GPL brings a legacy of trust combined with modern design thinking.
With a portfolio spanning residential, commercial, and township developments, Godrej Properties has delivered landmark projects across Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Bengaluru, Pune, and 12 other cities.

GPL's commitment to sustainability includes green-certified buildings, rainwater harvesting, and energy-efficient construction. The company has won over 300 awards for design and construction quality.

timeline.t: Godrej Properties incorporated as a subsidiary of Godrej Industries.
IPO on BSE and NSE, raising ₹500 Cr for expansion.
Crossed ₹10,000 Cr in annual booking value. Expanded to 16 cities.
Achieved highest-ever annual sales of ₹22,527 Cr.
Launched net-zero carbon roadmap for all new developments.
